subject: Refund request for spoiled milk
body: The baby milk I bought yesterday is expired. My baby got sick. I want a full refund immediately.

subject: شكوى بخصوص عربة تالفة
body: السلام عليكم، استلمت العربة اليوم ولكن العجلات مكسورة ولا يمكن استخدامها. أرجو استبدالها.

subject: Where is my order?
body: I ordered a stroller 10 days ago and it still hasn't arrived. Tracking says it is stuck in transit.

subject: تغيير عنوان التوصيل
body: أريد تغيير عنوان الشحن لطلبي رقم 12345. العنوان الجديد هو شارع الملك فهد.

subject: Double charge on my card
body: I see two identical charges for my last order on my bank statement. Please fix this.

subject: Great weather today
body: Just wanted to say that the sun is shining and I hope you have a nice day!

subject: Problem
body: I have a problem with something I bought. Call me.

subject: طلب استرجاع
body: أريد استرجاع المبلغ المدفوع لأن المنتج لم يعجبني.

subject: Login issues
body: I cannot access my account. I reset my password but it still doesn't work.
